architecture.notes: Architecture approved: browser-only data/control flow and no database for MVP.

implementation_plan.notes: Implementation plan approved from current feature/technical/UI artifacts; includes SEO and engineering principle checks.

project_initialization.notes: Rebuilt from ShipAny/TanStack template under ~/Games, created and pushed EdwardMatthews/image-size-checker with initial commit d21946ba34f277195879e283276f656a967559da.

research.notes: Research synthesized from HasData, agent-browser walkthroughs, last30days, and prior user product decisions; user requested complete rebuild without stopping for repeated review.

strategy.notes: Approved by prior user decisions: requirement-aware checker, second resizer page, no Requirement selector, batch summary, Web/SEO/Social/Print presets, URL later.

technical_solution.notes: Approved technical approach: client-side File/Canvas processing plus JSZip; no AI workflow needed; Pica/react-easy-crop deferred unless QA requires.

ui_design.notes: UI design uses ui-ux-pro-max direction and includes wireframe evidence; prior user requested mainstream upload-checker tone.
